ttfac.title: From weeks to minutes
ttfac.desc: Traditional API gateways require weeks of configuration. STOA gets your first AI agent connected in under 5 minutes.

mcp.title:
MCP-Native
from day one
mcp.desc: STOA speaks the Model Context Protocol natively. No adapters, no plugins, no middleware. Your AI agents connect directly to enterprise APIs through a standardized, secure gateway.

uac.title:
Universal API
Contract
uac.desc: Define your API contract once, and STOA exposes it everywhere — REST, GraphQL, MCP, gRPC. One source of truth that adapts to any consumer.

gateway.title:
Multi-Gateway
orchestration
gateway.desc: One control plane for all your gateways. STOA orchestrates Kong, Gravitee, Apigee, Azure APIM, AWS API Gateway, and webMethods from a single pane of glass.

architecture.title: Cloud + On-Premise
architecture.desc: Hybrid by design. Your data stays where you need it.

differentiators.title: What Makes Us Different
differentiators.desc: Four pillars that define the STOA approach.

cards.title: MCP-Native
cards.subtitle: Not a plugin. Architecture.
cards.desc: MCP is built into the core, not bolted on. Every API you publish is instantly available to AI agents via the Model Context Protocol.

cards.title: Universal API Contract
cards.subtitle: Define once, expose everywhere.
cards.desc: One contract powers REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and MCP endpoints. Change once, propagate to all consumers automatically.

cards.title: European Sovereign
cards.subtitle: Not US. Not UK. Not CN.
cards.desc: Designed for European data sovereignty. GDPR-native, NIS2-ready, DORA-supportive. Your data never leaves your jurisdiction.

cards.title: True Open Source
cards.subtitle: Apache 2.0. No BSL. No tricks.
cards.desc: Full Apache 2.0 license. No feature gates, no usage limits, no enterprise-only modules. Fork it, modify it, ship it.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.desc: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

plans.name: Community
plans.description: Full platform, no limits. Self-host or use our cloud.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For teams that need SLAs, SSO, and dedicated support.

plans.name: Sovereign
plans.description: For regulated industries requiring full data control.

pricing.footnote: Pricing details available upon request. Plans and quotas subject to change before general availability.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about STOA pricing and plans.

items.question: Is STOA really free?
items.answer: Yes. STOA is open source under the Apache 2.0 license. You can self-host the full platform forever at no cost. No usage limits, no feature gates, no trial expiration.

items.question: What's included in the Community plan?
items.answer: Everything you need to run an AI-native API gateway: MCP Protocol support, the Control Plane API, Console UI, Developer Portal, basic analytics, and community support via GitHub and Discord.

items.question: How does Enterprise pricing work?
items.answer: Enterprise pricing is based on your deployment scale and support needs. Contact our sales team for a custom quote. We offer flexible options for both cloud-hosted and on-premise deployments.

items.question: Can I self-host Enterprise features?
items.answer: Yes. STOA is designed for on-premise and hybrid deployments. Enterprise plans include advanced features like SSO/SAML, multi-environment support, and priority SLA — all deployable in your own infrastructure.

items.question: What's the Sovereign plan?
items.answer: The Sovereign plan is designed for regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, government) that require dedicated infrastructure, data residency guarantees, and compliance support for frameworks like NIS2 and DORA.

items.question: Do you offer a free trial?
items.answer: The Community plan is free forever — no trial needed. You get the full platform with no time limits. For Enterprise and Sovereign plans, we offer guided proof-of-concept engagements.

items.question: How do I migrate from another API gateway?
items.answer: STOA provides migration guides for Kong, Gravitee, Apigee, webMethods, and other popular gateways. Our multi-gateway orchestration lets you run STOA alongside your existing gateway during the transition.
